metadata.name: Hybrid GAS-ARSVJ-EVT Si Forecasting Engine
metadata.target_instrument: MOEX Si Futures (F0, F1, F2, F-n)
metadata.objective: Forecast conditional probability density f(S_T) with asymmetric spread for T1 (nearest Thursday) and T2 (next Thursday) based solely on realized underlying data

stage_1_filtering.model: GAS-X (Generalized Autoregressive Score with Exogenous Variables)
stage_1_filtering.objective: Filter latent local state parameters: drift (mu), vol (sigma), skewness (zeta), kurtosis (kappa)
stage_1_filtering.update_equation: theta_{t+1} = omega + A * s_t + B * theta_t + Gamma * X_t

delta_F2_F1.impact_sigma: Positive spread (Backwardation) increases sigma_{t+1} but induces negative drift on future vol (mean-reversion expectation). Negative spread (Contango) implies stability.
delta_F2_F1.impact_strategy: Determines mean-reversion speed for Calendars and wing pricing for BWB.

DoW_DayOfWeek.impact_mu: Shifts expected drift based on specific weekday anomalies (e.g., Thursday pre-clearing drift).
DoW_DayOfWeek.impact_zeta: Shifts expected skewness (e.g., Friday/Thursday negative skew for downside gap risk).

gap_metrics.impact_kappa: Elevated frequency/amplitude increases tail thickness forecast (kappa).

stage_2_simulation.objective: Generate price trajectories using GAS-X outputs as initial conditions (S_0, v_0)
stage_2_simulation.sde_price: dS_t / S_t = mu_DoW * dt + sqrt(v_t) * dW_t^S + J_t * dN_t
stage_2_simulation.sde_variance: dv_t = kappa_spr * (theta_spr - v_t) * dt + xi * sqrt(v_t) * dW_t^v

kappa_spr_MeanReversionSpeed.logic: Mapped to F2-F1 spread. If spread > 0 (Backwardation), kappa_spr is HIGH (vol is unstable, expects reversion to F2). If spread < 0 (Contango), kappa_spr is LOW.

theta_spr_LongTermVol.logic: Anchored to YZ_250d and F2 vol metrics.

dN_t_JumpProcess.logic: Intensity lambda_t is driven by gap_clustering_autocorr. If lag1 > 0.25, enable serial jump mode.

J_t_JumpSize.p_down_Parameter: Derived dynamically from semivar_down / semivar_up ratio. Critical for modeling asymmetric tail spread.

rollover_logic_F1_to_F2.condition: Simulating beyond F1 expiry for T2 horizon
rollover_logic_F1_to_F2.action: Switch diffusion parameters from F1 to F2, inject basis_vol_20d as transition noise.

stage_3_tail_approximation.model: EVT (Extreme Value Theory - Peak Over Threshold)
stage_3_tail_approximation.objective: Correct diffusion underestimation of extreme moves (< 5% tail) for Condors/BWB wings
stage_3_tail_approximation.distribution: GPD (Generalized Pareto Distribution) with parameters (xi_EVT, beta)
stage_3_tail_approximation.calibration_data: F-n historical returns filtered by high gap_frequency regimes

Iron_Condor.requirement: Range-bound, symmetric/controlled channel, low tail exit probability
metrics_to_extract: Inter-Quantile Range: [q_10%, q_90%] for T1, [q_15%, q_85%] for T2
Wing Asymmetry Scaling: If P(S < q_10%) != P(S > q_90%), scale put-wing width by (semivar_down / semivar_up)
Iron_Condor.kill_condition: EVT shape parameter xi_EVT > 0.3 (Fat tails detected)

Iron_Butterfly.requirement: Minimal variance around ATM, mode alignment with S_0
metrics_to_extract: Mode alignment: Verify mode of f(S_T) matches current S_0
DoW Drift Adjustment: If DoW forces mu < 0, short strike must be shifted down
Conditional Probability Shift: Delta_P = P(S_T < S_0 - delta) - P(S_T > S_0 + delta)
GAS Skew Forecast: Evaluate zeta_{T_thu}. If left-skewed (downside), construct Put BWB.
Backwardation Edge: If F1 > F2 vol, sell F1 wing, buy F2 wing (vol mean-reversion gives 'free' long wing).
BWB_Broken_Wing_Butterfly.direction_logic: Put BWB if semivar ratio > 1.3 and zeta < 0; Call BWB if ratio < 0.7 and zeta > 0.

metrics_to_extract: GAS-X Drift: Evaluate mu_hat for T1/T2 incorporating DoW effects.
ROC Momentum: If ROC_5d > 30%, process is non-stationary, ARSVJ simulates trend continuation.
Gap Clustering: If high_clustering + downside_bias, Put Vertical has mathematical edge (cascade risk).
Debit_Vertical.direction_logic: Follow mu_hat direction and gap bias.

Calendar.requirement: Volatility spread mean-reversion between F1 and F2
metrics_to_extract: F2-F1 Spread Forecast: If YZ_F1 - YZ_F2 > 0 (Backwardation) and kappa_spr is HIGH, model predicts v_F1 drop and v_F2 rise (spread convergence).
DoW Session Compression: If GAS-X indicates sigma_DoW=Thu < sigma_avg, entry on Thursday optimizes short-leg sale.
Calendar.validity_condition: Long Calendar valid ONLY in Backwardation with high mean-reversion speed. Forbidden in Contango.

implementation_pipeline_python.step_1_preprocessing: Extract S_t, YZ, semivar ratios, gap metrics. Form matrices for X_t (Spreads, DoW).
implementation_pipeline_python.step_2_gas_x_estimation: Maximize log-likelihood of GHST distribution. Output filtered theta_hat_t (mu, sigma, zeta, kappa).
implementation_pipeline_python.step_3_arsvj_simulation: Euler-Maruyama scheme with Sobol quasi-random numbers. Kou jump thinning algorithm. N=100,000 paths.
implementation_pipeline_python.step_4_evt_overlay: Filter simulated extremes > 90th percentile. Fit GPD via scipy.stats.genpareto.
implementation_pipeline_python.step_5_output_generation: Calculate quantiles (5, 10, 25, 50, 75, 90, 95) and Kernel Density Estimate. Evaluate strategy extraction logic rules.
